overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway with reflective floors and indoor gardens, past large corporate billboards, and onto a busy commercial street with neon signage and light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with indoor landscaping and reflective flooring

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered pedestrian arcade with reflective floors, passing benches and indoor planters

notable_agents.action: bald man in tank top walking past camera from right to left

entered.detail: grid-patterned glass and metal ceiling structure covering the walkway
large rectangular glass planters containing small trees and greenery
highly polished dark stone flooring reflecting ceiling lights
continuous yellow tactile paving strip running along walkway edge
black metal benches with people sitting along the right wall
illuminated soda brand sign on the right wall
large illuminated text sign reading DREAM ON suspended from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway with a reflective marble floor and glass planters containing trees on the left. The ceiling features a grid structure with embedded lighting. A bald man in a tank top walks past the camera on the right, while other pedestrians are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area under overpass with corporate billboards and traffic barriers

events.description: exits covered pedestrian walkway into open air under overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past large BioTechnica billboard and illuminated arrow barriers toward the street

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying BIO TECHNICA logo with green leaf symbol
series of black barriers with glowing yellow chevron arrows pointing forward
tall concrete wall with horizontal paneling at the end of the walkway
opening to the main street level with visible traffic beyond the barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a transitional space under an overpass. A massive BioTechnica billboard dominates the left side while illuminated arrow barriers line the right. The environment shifts from enclosed to open air as the camera approaches street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk along concrete retaining wall with fashion advertisements

events.description: turns right to follow sidewalk along high concrete wall with large billboard

agents.ego_description: turning right corner and walking alongside tall concrete wall with fashion billboard, approaching main street

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket and white pants walking towards camera along the wall

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with large square tile pattern running along the sidewalk
large illuminated billboard showing fashion models with RR logo
tall green metal street lamp with multiple fixtures
elevated walkway bridge crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a high concrete tiled wall on the left featuring a large fashion billboard. The yellow tactile strip shifts to the left side as the path curves. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with neon signage and vehicle traffic

events.description: turns left onto main commercial street with heavy neon signage and crosswalk
crosses street at crosswalk while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk in a busy commercial district with neon billboards and moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: multi-story building facade with bright neon strip lighting and commercial signage
large billboard featuring astronaut helmet with text WHO CAN YOU TRUST
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
horizontal neon light strips under the overpass structure
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a busy commercial street with heavy neon lighting. The scene features a crosswalk with yellow stripes, a large TRUST billboard with an astronaut image, and futuristic vehicles driving past. Pedestrians walk in various directions as the camera crosses the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, enclosed pedestrian corridor into the vibrant, neon-lit chaos of a futuristic commercial district. It begins within a covered walkway characterized by reflective marble floors and glass planters, moving past a few scattered pedestrians under a grid-lit ceiling. As the camera exits the enclosure, the space opens up beneath an overpass dominated by a massive BioTechnica billboard and illuminated barriers. The path then shifts right along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a high concrete wall and fashion advertisements before curving toward a busy intersection. Finally, the scene expands into a wide commercial street filled with heavy neon signage, futuristic vehicles, and a large TRUST billboard as the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk.
